title: DEERC D12 Hand Operated Flying Toy Drone for Kids, UFO Flying Ball Mini Drone with Cool LED Lights, 5 Motion Sensors,2 Speeds,360° Flips, Anti-Collision, Indoor Small UFO Toy Gifts for Boys and Girls
features: [Advanced Hand Operated Drone]: The best flying toys and gifts for kids, teenagers, and adults; Updated 5 infrared motion sensors to detect obstacles and steer by hand, it delivers hours of interactive flying fun for the whole family.

[Easy to Fly]: Toss this drone gently in the air, it will automatically hover, put your hand up and close, it will fly to the direction you want. 2 speed available, so easy to control even for boys and girls 6+ years old. A great choice for beginners!

[Safe and Durable Design]: This flying toys is made of high grade ABS material which is lightweight and flexible. With full protection guard, you have no worries of hurt by propellers to your kids. USB charging port allows to charge easily and conveniently.

[Highly Responsive Sensors]: Equipped with five upgraded side motion sensors, this drone offers more accurate detection and smoother flight control. It performs gravity-defying hovering and 360° rotations for a fun and impressive flying experience.

[Mini and Portable]: This mini flying ball drone is ideal for indoor spaces like living rooms, offices, and dorms, as well as outdoor play. A perfect gift for birthdays, parties, or Christmas—great for boys, girls, and drone lovers of all ages.
